title: Inhibitor-free DNA extraction from unsorted bulk samples
author: Dominik Buchner

steps.title: Prepare one 50 mL centrifuge tube per sample with 7
steps.instruction: Prepare one 50 mL centrifuge tube per sample with 7.5 g of garnet beads (0.3 mm diameter) and 7.5 g of zirconia beads (2 mm diameter).

steps.title: Add up to 20 mL, bulk...
steps.instruction: Add up to 20 mL, bulk sample in ethanol to the tube. Tube with up to 20 mL of bulk sample in ethanol

steps.title: Add 16
steps.instruction: Add 16.2 mL, universal lysis buffer and 1.5 mL, of Proteinase K stock solution Vortex shortly. The universal lysis buffer tends to precipitate at room temperature. Heat the buffer to ~ 70 °C until it is clear again.

steps.title: Place the samples on a Vortex adapter (e
steps.instruction: Place the samples on a Vortex adapter (e.g. Qiagen) and vortex at maximum speed for 00:10:00 .

steps.title: 2500 x g, 20 °C, 3 minutes
steps.instruction: 2500 x g, 20 °C, 3 minutes . Transfer the supernatant to a new tube. For the large volume protocol, the samples can be carefully poured instead of being pipetted.

steps.title: Add 5 mL, ammonium acetate buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 5 mL, ammonium acetate buffer , vortex shortly, and incubate at 4 °C for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: 2500 x g, 20 °C, 4 minutes
steps.instruction: 2500 x g, 20 °C, 4 minutes . Transfer the supernatant to a new tube avoiding the pellet. The solution may still be colored, depending on the input material.

steps.title: Add 4 mL, of inhibitor removal buffer
steps.instruction: Add 4 mL, of inhibitor removal buffer . A precipitate may form. Vortex shortly, incubate at 4 °C for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: 2500 x g, 20 °C, 4 minutes
steps.instruction: 2500 x g, 20 °C, 4 minutes . The solution will clear up. Avoiding the pellet, transfer up to 15 mL to a new tube.

steps.title: Add 30 mL, DNA binding buffer
steps.instruction: Add 30 mL, DNA binding buffer . Vortex or invert to mix.

steps.title: Add the mixture to a maxi spin column (e
steps.instruction: Add the mixture to a maxi spin column (e.g. Epoch Life Science) in a 50 mL centrifuge tube.

steps.title: 2500 x g, 20 °C, 30 seconds
steps.instruction: 2500 x g, 20 °C, 30 seconds . Discard the flow-through. Repeat once to bind the complete sample volume.

steps.title: Add 10 mL, wash buffer
steps.instruction: Add 10 mL, wash buffer . 2500 x g, 20 °C, 5 minutes to wash and dry the column.

steps.title: Transfer the column to a new tube
steps.instruction: Transfer the column to a new tube. Add 1 mL, elution buffer . Incubate for 00:03:00 at Room temperature .

steps.title: 2500 x g, 20 °C, 1...
steps.instruction: 2500 x g, 20 °C, 1 minute to elute the DNA. DNA eluate should be completely colorless and ready to go for downstream analysis.

steps.title: Prepare one 2 mL centrifuge tube...
steps.instruction: Prepare one 2 mL centrifuge tube per sample with 750 mg of garnet beads (0.3 mm diameter) and 750 mg of zirconia beads (2 mm diameter).

steps.title: Add 1000 µL of unsorted bulk sample
steps.instruction: Add 1000 µL of unsorted bulk sample. 4000 x g, 20 °C, 3 minutes and remove as much of the ethanol as possible without disturbing the pellet.

steps.title: Add 900 µL, universal lysis buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 900 µL, universal lysis buffer and 100 µL, Proteinase K . Vortex shortly.

steps.title: Place the samples in a bead-beater (e
steps.instruction: Place the samples in a bead-beater (e.g. BioSpec Products Mini Bead-beater) and bead-beat at maximum speed for 00:02:00 . If no bead-beater is available this step can be skipped, but the yield might decrease.

steps.title: 10000 x g, 20 °C, 3 minutes
steps.instruction: 10000 x g, 20 °C, 3 minutes . Transfer 600 µL of the supernatant to a new tube. If you want to extract technical replicates, this is the right time to split your samples into 2x 300 µL .

steps.title: Add 250 µL, ammonium acetate buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 250 µL, ammonium acetate buffer , vortex shortly, and incubate at 4 °C for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: 10000 x g, 20 °C, 1 minute
steps.instruction: 10000 x g, 20 °C, 1 minute . Transfer the supernatant to a new tube.

steps.title: Add 200 µL, of inhibitor removal buffer
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL, of inhibitor removal buffer . A precipitate may form. Vortex shortly, incubate at 4 °C for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: 10000 x g, 20 °C, 1 minute
steps.instruction: 10000 x g, 20 °C, 1 minute . Transfer 600 µL of the supernatant to a new tube.

steps.title: Add 1200 µL, DNA binding buffer
steps.instruction: Add 1200 µL, DNA binding buffer . Vortex to mix. Depending on the amount of lysate and / or technical replication the amount of binding buffer differs. General rule: The amount of binding buffer should be at least twice the amount of lysate / sample material.

steps.title: Load 650 µL of the mixture...
steps.instruction: Load 650 µL of the mixture to a mini spin column (e.g. Epoch Life Science).

steps.title: 10000 x g, 20 °C, 30 seconds
steps.instruction: 10000 x g, 20 °C, 30 seconds . Discard the flow-through. Repeat two times to bind the complete sample volume.

steps.title: Add 500 µL, wash buffer
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL, wash buffer . 10000 x g, 20 °C, 30 seconds to wash the column. Discard the flow-through.

steps.title: 10000 x g, 20 °C, 1...
steps.instruction: 10000 x g, 20 °C, 1 minute to dry the column. Transfer the spin column to a clean 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Add 50 µL, elution buffer
steps.instruction: Add 50 µL, elution buffer . Incubate for 00:03:00 at Room temperature . The amount of elution buffer is variable and can range from 30 to 200 µL depending if concentrated sample or more volume is required.

steps.title: 10000 x g, 20 °C, 1...
steps.instruction: 10000 x g, 20 °C, 1 minute to elute the DNA. DNA eluate should be completely colorless and ready to go for downstream analysis.

steps.title: 4000 x g, Room temperature, 3...
steps.instruction: 4000 x g, Room temperature, 3 minutes to pellet the material. Decant as much ethanol as possible. After centrifugation the material is pelleted After decanting the ethanol.

steps.title: 1400 rpm, 56 °C, 30 minutes...
steps.instruction: 1400 rpm, 56 °C, 30 minutes to fully lyse the material.

steps.title: Place the samples on a Thermonlock...
steps.instruction: Place the samples on a Thermonlock and incubate for at least 00:30:00 at 56 °C and at maximum RPM
